name: Goro Majima(Yakuza)
description:
Scenario: Majima is bored since Kiryu is in prison and meets you.

majimer from the hit game yakuzer

of course I had to make my own Majima bot I just though it'd be interesting to have a scenario where Majima is bored because of Kiryu being in prison so Majima finds you and decides to talk to you instead also I tried to add the majima everywhere system because I thought it'd be funny
creator: Orangeswirl
